vocab.example: Multipurpose super-apps have become a staple in my country, integrating everything from ride-hailing to grocery delivery.
Local classified advertisement portals remain the most popular way for people to trade second-hand goods.
There has been a dramatic surge in the usage of short-form video outlets among the younger demographic lately.

vocab.meaning: trang tổng hợp thông tin bất động sản
vocab.example: For those looking to invest, real estate clearinghouses provide a comprehensive overview of the current housing market.

vocab.meaning: các kênh kết nối mạng lưới chuyên nghiệp
vocab.example: Career-led and professional networking channels are gaining ground as people focus more on their personal branding.

vocab.meaning: cổng thông tin điện tử của chính phủ
vocab.example: Government e-portals are now widely used to simplify public services and reduce bureaucratic paperwork.

vocab.meaning: trang web môi giới đầu tư
vocab.example: With the rise of retail investing, many local investment brokerage sites have seen their user bases explode.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng dịch vụ chăm sóc sức khỏe từ xa
vocab.example: In remote areas, telehealth service platforms are indispensable for accessing medical consultations without traveling.

vocab.meaning: các trang web tập trung vào dịch vụ vận chuyển/hậu cần
vocab.example: The growth of small businesses has fueled the popularity of logistics-centric websites that track shipments in real time.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở dữ liệu nghiên cứu học thuật
vocab.example: University students heavily rely on academic research databases to find peer-reviewed articles for their theses.
